reviews.review_description:
Throwing balls goes very smooth. Play solo, against an Elf, or against friends. 

You can choose between 5 different lanes / environments which has an Elf, with his own humor. 

And if you don’t like the music on the background, just turn the radio to the next song.

Jingle Strike is a very fun VR Bowling Game - IG is an arcade-like bowling variant where you for to hit many pins within a limited time. Physics are solid and the "christmas market" style lobby looks super cool. I am also enjoying the tron-like neon colour style graphics inside the bowling hall 🙂

Overall a cool and worthwile VR experience!

Jingle Strike VR Bowling delivers a cheerful, accessible bowling experience with solid physics and playful elves reacting to every roll. Festive lanes, arcade mode, and couch play make it perfect for parties and holiday fun in VR.
